nodes.label: P5.7 — the continual-safety gate: temp0.2 keeps the A6 win -> banked
nodes.rationale: GATE PASS on digits and synth: temp0.2 holds AA and BWT within the -0.02 gate (even forgets less on synth); the P5.1-feared 'sharper temp overwrites prior tasks' does not materialize because the bulk is unsupervised/forward-only — forgetting lives in the readout, which sleep recovers identically regardless of temp; temp0.2/w2 banked unconditionally.

nodes.label: P5.7 verdict: temp0.2 GATE PASS — the A6 continual win is preserved, temp0.2 banked unconditionally
nodes.rationale: On digits and synth, temp0.2 holds AA and BWT within the -0.02 gate versus the P4.5 baseline (even forgets less on synth); the no-sleep control collapses identically for both temperatures, proving forgetting lives in the readout (which sleep recovers) not the unsupervised bulk — the P5.1-feared risk did not materialize; L12 is continual-tolerable but noisier than L4, so deploy shallow on the continual home.
